subcodes.first_line: While We were walking in the house and uttering the verses of God, the servant who was present entered with thy letter and laid it before the Wronged One. We have answered thee [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: انا کنا ماشیا فی البیت و ناطقا بایات الله دخل العبد الحاضر بکتابک و عرضه لدی المظلوم اجبناک
